package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for order_by_clause_literals_scattered_across_layers: Raw sort expressions duplicated in handlers and services instead of query helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule106NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule106NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule106NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario106Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule106NegativeService, input Rule106NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
